name: design-port
description: Design-to-dev handoff pipeline: port AI-generated design exports to other frameworks via an explicit intermediate spec.

plugins.name: design-port-pipeline
plugins.description: Port a Claude Design export (React) to another framework via a layered spec — DTCG tokens, component specs, and statecharts — rather than direct code translation. Includes contract excavation, spec extraction, Leptos codegen, visual verification, and sync.
